programme.desc: En el centro comercial, Perro y Gato se sientan sobre el regazo de Santa cuando una malcriada niña (la sobrina de Rancio el Conejo) anuncia que quiere a Perro y Gato como regalo de Navidad.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato logran conseguir un nuevo trabajo como Perro Bombero en el departamento de bomberos de Nearburg. / Perro entra al espectáculo de perros de Nearburg y se disfraza como un afgano peludo con corte de cabello.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El hambriento Perro y Gato comen una tonelada de comida en Rib Room, se ponen muy obesos y desafortunadamente no pueden pagar la cuenta de un muy altísimo costo. / Perro y Gato convierten su casa en un hotel de lujo para ganar dinero.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Shriek decide renunciar a los Grasosos y cumplir su sueño de ser campeón de patinaje sobre hielo. / Perro se golpea en la cabeza mientras persigue el camión de la basura y le da amnesia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras pasean por la Feria Estatal, Perro y Gato se encuentran montando sobre un feroz toro. / El odontólogo Rancio el Conejo descubre que cualquier cosa que Perro coma, afecta a los dientes de Gato y viceversa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: A pesar de las objeciones de Gato, Perro arrastra a Gato al Parque Temático para subirse a Butt Buster, una montaña rusa que va a 200 millas por hora. / El Alcalde Rancio necesita más fondos para su tina de monedas de oro.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Chas se enamora de una oficial de policía, pero Carlitos le tiene miedo ya que piensa que lo puede enviar a la cárcel. / El hermano de Didi y su esposa quieren tener un bebé, y cuidan a los Rugrats una noche a modo de prueba.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica va a su programa infantil favorito, y mientras espía a la anfitriona del programa, aprende una mala palabra, la cual se la repite a todo el mundo. / Jonathan cuida a los niños y busca formas de chantajear a Carlota.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos se enamora de Emma, una niña que juega sola en el parque. El único problema es que es la hermanita de un sobreprotector niño más grande. / Los Rugrats van a una pizzería e intentan recuperar unos boletos que le robaron a Angélica.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy es confundido con otro bebé que tiene un gran diente y es un buscapleitos. Cuando unas amigas del abuelo dicen que quieren “comerse” a Carlitos, los Rugrats piensan que ellas se lo quieren comer de verdad.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Travel back to ancient Japan for a madcap adventure starring the Straw Hats, some old friends and enemies, and a camel that eats lottery tickets!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Flashback to the dark past of Rob Lucci as the young boy learns to dispense a cold, cruel, and brutal brand of justice. Back in real time, Luffy’s battle with Lucci threatens to destroy the navy fleet.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s gigantic attack on Lucci takes a devastating toll on his body, Robin rejoins the fight, and the rest of the Straw Hats struggle to survive underwater!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to a little help from what appears to be a mermaid, the Straw Hats find themselves reunited aboard an escape vessel, but the fate of Luffy and the Franky Family is yet to be determined!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes his body to the breaking point in his battle with Lucci, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to fight off a fleet of Marines until their captain returns – if he ever does.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy lies battered and badly beaten, but Usopp’s desperate pleas inspire the rubber-man to mount one final, furious attack on Rob Lucci!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their leader crippled by exhaustion and their escape ship destroyed, the Straw Hats find themselves with only one treacherous option: throwing themselves into the sea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats are rescued by the unexpected arrival of a dear old friend, but they’ll have to avoid a barrage of deadly cannonballs in order to survive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats bid a tearful farewell to the brave little ship that was their home for so very many adventures. Rest in peace, Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats get some much needed rest and relaxation, Franky makes a big announcement, and Vice Admiral Garp tracks down his grandson!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s friends are shocked to learn that his grandpa is a marine hero, but that’s nothing compared to how surprised they’ll be by his father’s true identity!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Just before New Year's, a hockey mom is gunned down at her front door; later that night, seven more bodies are found in another suburban home; police discover a shocking connection between the two crimes as they track down the killer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death while driving her sons home from a Thanksgiving celebration; the hunt for her killer leads to an unlikely suspect, making investigators realize her murder is not as random as it seems.

programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning; a single palm print is left behind; investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays

programme.title: Skyfall

programme.title: Spectre

programme.desc: Una fortuna de diamantes robados pone a James Bond en acción nuevamente. En esta emocionante aventura, Sean Connery regresa como el Agente 007 y hace equipo con la bella Tiffany Case.

programme.desc: A poacher traps an endangered Iriomote cat on a remote island and boards a ferry. Onboard is Black Jack and Pinoko, along with a haughty politician. The wild cat escapes, causing a ruckus, and injuring the politician and a passenger's baby.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Sharaku is a middle-schooler who is often bullied. One day, Pinoko saves him from Kong, a bully, and they become friends. Sharaku suddenly becomes gravely sick and Black Jack is called into the hospital to operate on him.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: At Tom, their favorite cafe, Black Jack and Pinoko encounter a boy with a physical disability who is intently reading a book by a handicapped person. Inspired by the memoir, he decides to walk 350km from Hiroshima to Osaka by himself.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko and Sharaku are playing in a park when a stray dog grabs Pinoko's purse and runs off. They chase after the stray, but the dog is suddenly hit by a car outside of the park. Pinoko gets Black Jack to operate on the dog, and is successful.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: The bully Kong comes home to his sister Chako, who has been diagnosed with tuberculosis and another unknown disease. Chako, having heard about Black Jack, wants her brother to find him and take her case.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Doctors at Manaka Hospital hold a conference to decide the successor to the recently deceased hospital director. There are two veteran doctors with 20 years experience, however, one other doctor with similar experience is overlooked, Dr. Shiitake.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: A boy is reluctant to go to school because he is afraid of his strict teacher, Mr. Muramasa. The teacher explains to this co-workers that he tries to motivate students by a tough-love approach.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack and Pinoko visit a zoo to see a white lion cub named Luna Luna, but the lion is sick. Pinoko and the lion's keeper beg Black Jack for help, but he refuses.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack takes Pinoko to his favorite sushi restaurant. The sushi chef, Taku, after years of training, feels that he is now ready to make the best sushi in Japan for his blind mother. However, he is hit by a truck and loses his arms.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: An old lady is forced to leave her son's hospital where she is living when it becomes full with patients. The son's wife proposes to have her sent to a nursing home, but the son refuses. Pinoko and Sharaku befriend her and offer a place to stay.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Black Jack receives correspondence from overseas regarding a 200-year-old patient suffering from a painful disease. A relative of the patient offers 10 million dollars for successful treatment. Black Jack at first decides not to go, but changes his mind.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko notices that Largo has fetched a pearl. She shows Black Jack, which surprises him, and he heads out to the shore. Pinoko and Largo follow, and they come across a bay filled with shining pearls. Black Jack tells Pinoko the story of the killer whale.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko and Sharaku watch a TV show, and Pinoko takes a liking to the monster villain of the show instead of the hero. Sharaku is friends with the show staff and Pinoko ends up visiting the set at the TV studio.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Kazuo is a star gymnast at the local high school Everyone has high expectations that he will medal at the athletic competition, but he feels pain in his left arm. His classmate Toshie notices the swollen arm is getting worse, and alerts his mother.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko visits a pool with Sharaku, and despite Black Jack's warning not to go into the water, she goes in with an inner tube. She begins to drown, but is saved by Musashi, a lifeguard who also works as an animator.

programme.desc: Michiru learns that she has terminal cancer and only a few weeks left to live. Her dying wish is to marry the next man who walks into her hospital room, even if it is just a token wedding.

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Rei is the school's star vocalist, and is popular among the students. Kumiko notices Rei coughing in pain. However, she continues to sing, practicing for a contest coming up in three months. Rei asks Kumiko if her father, Dr. Honma, can examine her.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Jun has a best friend that he has never met before in person. He is Tom from New Zealand, with whom he chats often online. Although Jun's condition doesn't allow him to play sports, he tells Tom he plays baseball. Jun's mother disapproves of the charade.

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.desc: At Cafe Tom, Black Jack and Pinoko listen as Kumiko relates her first love. She was about to fall off a rooftop when a man rescued her, but she doesn't recall his face or name.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: While out shopping, Pinoko spots a field and goes off looking for four-leaf clovers. She runs into a boy named Tink, and they soon become close. She arrives home and starts to write a love letter.

programme.title: Black Jack

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Volcanic Odysseys

programme.title: The Ides of March
programme.desc: Ambition seduces and power corrupts in a nerve-wracking thriller from Academy Award nominated director George Clooney (Good Night, and Good Luck). Rating: R

programme.title: The Motel
programme.desc: Puberty sucks, and nobody knows it better than 13-year-old Ernest. As he watches guests come and go, Ernest finds himself forever stuck at his family's hourly-rate motel and longing for the girl of his dreams, 15-year-old Christine.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: Sex. Money. Power. Drugs. Brace yourself for a true story from legendary filmmaker Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio stars as a young stockbroker hungry for a life of non-stop thrills, where corruption was king and more was never enough.

programme.title: The Fisher King
programme.desc: Parry, a homeless history professor, lives in a fantasy world full of castles, Red Knights and damsels in distress. Bridges co-stars as Jack, New York's #1 shock deejay, whose off-hand arrogance triggers a tragedy which ruins his career. Rated: R

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: A thrilling misadventure involving three ingenious orphans and a villainous actor named Count Olaf (Jim Carrey) who wants their enormous fortune.

programme.title: Coraline
programme.desc: Coraline Jones discovers a secret world that's like her own, but better! When her Other Mother tries to keep her, Coraline must be brave to get home.

programme.title: The Boxtrolls
programme.desc: When evil Archibald Snatcher decides to capture the Boxtrolls – lovable, box-wearing creatures – it’s up to Eggs and his friend Winnie to same them.

programme.title: Young Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: When a plague of bizarre, puzzling murders grip London, young Holmes and his new found friend Watson find themselves unwittingly entangled in the dark mystery.

programme.title: The Green Knight
programme.desc: An epic fantasy adventure based on the timeless Arthurian legend, The Green Knight tells the story of Sir Gawain, King Arthur's reckless and headstrong nephew, who embarks on a daring quest to confront the eponymous Green Knight.

programme.title: The Monster Squad
programme.desc: Young kids form a club that is devoted to monsters, but soon get more than they bargained for when Dracula adjourns to Earth, with Frankenstein's Monster, Wolfman, Mummy, and the Gillman.

programme.title: Devon
programme.desc: Years after Devon disappeared, a mysterious website draws five adventurers to the abandoned asylum where she was last seen. Armed with cameras, they plunge into the darkness, unaware they’re filming their own descent into horror—never meant to return.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: A woman who is the last to leave her office on Christmas Eve must rely on her wits to survive when she is trapped in a parking garage with a deranged security guard.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night
programme.desc: Josh Hartnett (The Black Dahlia, Pearl Harbor) crosses over to the dark side in this bone-chilling adaptation of the cult-hit graphic novel, brought to the screen in all its demonic glory.

programme.title: 30 Days of Night: Dark Days
programme.desc: Almost a year has passed since Barrow, Alaska’s population was decimated by vampires. Stella, mourning her husband’s murder, has been travelling the world trying to convince others that vampires exist.

programme.title: Feast
programme.desc: Customers locked inside a bar are forced to fight monsters.

programme.title: Bug
programme.desc: A paranoid, unhinged war veteran who sees insects everywhere holes up with a lonely woman in a spooky Oklahoma motel room.

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: For a birthday celebration, three couples partake in an ESCAPE ROOM, in which they must work together to solve puzzles in order to escape the room—but when the game turns deadly, they quickly learn the only winners are the survivors.

programme.title: Child's Play (2019)
programme.desc: In this shocking re-imagining of the horror classic, single mother Karen (Aubrey Plaza) buys her son Andy (Gabriel Bateman) a seemingly innocent, AI-enhanced Buddi doll, unaware of its more sinister nature…and its true name…Chucky!

programme.title: Shutter Island
programme.desc: When U.S. Marshal Teddy Daniels arrives at the asylum for the criminally insane on Shutter Island, he uncovers terrifying truths about the island and finds out some places never let you go.

programme.title: Patriot Games
programme.desc: Jack Ryan is caught in the middle of a terrorist attack. Ryan helps to thwart Holmes’ assailants and becomes a local hero. But Ryan’s act marks him as a target. Now he must return to action to save his family.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: One More Shot

programme.title: Wild Things
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon, Matt Dillon and Neve Campbell star in a steamy story of murder, intrigue and sex. Rated: R

programme.title: Red

programme.title: Identity

programme.desc: The random murder of a woman in Central Montana sends law enforcement on the hunt for a killer.

programme.desc: The brutal murder of a recent widower inside his North Dakota home is investigated.

programme.desc: The discovery of a Jane Doe underneath a New Jersey bridge kick starts an intensive investigation to figure out who she is and how she died.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: After they encounter a very long bridge that can be only crossed by bike, a job delivering medicine is just the ticket for Ash and friends to reach Sunnytown!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Caught in a sudden rain shower, our heroes quickly try to seek some shelter. Dragging a very reluctant Misty, Ash, and Brock go inside a cabin, and instantly get the impression that they are not alone!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The gang discovers a large group of wild Pikachu, and though they first seem frightened by the intruder, the group eventually opens up to Ash’s Pikachu. How will Pikachu feel seeing others of its kind in the wild?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and his friends find a large home with a lavish garden party in full swing, attended by the Trainers of Pokémon who evolve using Evolution stones. Maybe they can see the seemingly abandoned Eevee’s Trainer here?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Our hungry heroes arrive at a small village. In return for a meal, Ash, Misty, and Brock agree to investigate what is causing the river to dry up, destroying the village’s harvest.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: We join our heroes on the outskirts of Dark City, which appears to be deserted. Even during the middle of the day, there is no one on the streets. What has happened to make this place so desolate?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash is hard at work, continuing his rigorous training schedule even over spring vacation—until our heroes discover there’s a traveling carnival nearby! Ash, Misty, and Brock quickly join in the fun of the fair!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Still in hot pursuit of our heroes, Team Rocket is ready to make yet another attempt to catch Pikachu—until disaster strikes! It soon becomes apparent that Meowth is getting sick!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Putting her idea of catching Jigglypuff aside for now, Misty promises to find a solution to this Pokémon’s singing situation!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: According to Ash’s rival Gary, fossils from extinct Pokémon have been discovered in the area, triggering a great fossil rush in the canyon. Ash decides to join in the excavation as a chance to beat Gary!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash is sleeping peacefully until he is awoken by Brock and Misty with alarming news: there’s something wrong with Pikachu’s voice! When Ash becomes concerned, he runs to the nearest Pokémon Center with Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: As our heroes are walking in the countryside, they notice a 'Missing Persons' poster of an undeniably familiar face: it looks exactly like James from Team Rocket! Is it really him in the poster?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Our heroes discuss the rumor that a rare wild Farfetch has been seen in the area. Ash and Misty both vow to catch it, and soon they get their chance when the Pokémon appears!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On leaving the Pokémon Center, our heroes discuss what they think will hatch from the Pokémon Egg Ash discovered. Nearby, Team Rocket begins hatching another daring plan to make it theirs!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: During a battle with another Trainer’s Rhyhorn, the bulb on Bulbasaur’s back begins to glow, prompting Ash to take it to the local Pokémon Center. They soon discover that Bulbasaur isn’t sick—it’s getting ready to evolve!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On their way to Cinnabar Island, our heroes join Officer Jenny and the police force’s Growlithe in some special training, hoping to improve Pikachu’s battling skills.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: On a brief stop for lunch, Ash, and his friends meet Todd Snap, a Pokémon photographer who has been trying to get a perfect shot of Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Realizing that he hasn’t won any Gym badges for a while, Ash signs up for the Pokémon League Admissions Exam, a great chance to prove he’s got what it takes to become a Pokémon Master!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and the gang decide to check out a breeding center that they saw on a commercial. However, the center is a cover for a diabolical scheme from Team Rocket members Butch and Cassidy—old rivals of Jessie and James!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Misty and Jessie compete to be Queen of the Princess Festival! Ash and Brock lend Misty their Pokémon for the battle, and Jessie takes a licking despite a surprise Pokémon of her own.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: It’s Kids Day, and Ash and friends help some schoolchildren celebrate. Team Rocket spoils the fun by grabbing a kid instead of Pikachu. In a shocking turn of events, Meowth becomes a good guy…or does he?

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes travel to Cinnabar Island, where Ash hopes to win the Volcano Badge. A strange character offers riddles about how to find the Gym, where Ash and Pikachu have a fiery battle with a Pokémon they’ve never seen before!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash has finally located the Gym, suspended above a pool of molten lava! This battle for the Volcano Badge can only be won by a strong Fire-type Pokémon, so Ash must rely on his misbehaving Charizard.

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, and Misty get sidetracked on their way to Viridian City when all of their belongings mysteriously disappear. While searching for their missing things, they find themselves mixed up in a close encounter that’s really out of this world!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands
programme.desc: Our heroes make their way to Viridian City, where Ash hopes to earn the Earth Badge. They get to the Gym just in time to see his rival, Gary, being defeated by an unknown Pokémon—and Gary insists that it's evil!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Big Brawl - Part 3: As the BattleNexus Tournament continues, Leonardo has been poisoned and lies unconscious fighting for his life. Splinter is wrongly imprisoned for an attempt on the Daimyo's life.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Big Brawl - Part 4: It's down and dirty time. Splinter is imprisoned. Leo is dying of poison. Don and Usagi are fighting for their lives and the life of the Daimyo against a horde of assassins.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Christmas Aliens: Christmas is supposed to be a time of giving, not taking! But when a dangerous gang of thieves hijack a truck full of holiday toys on its way to an orphanage, it's time for Michelangelo to start passing out some season's beatings!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Space Invaders - Part 1: The Triceratons have invaded looking for the Fugitoid. Unfortunately, no one on earth knows what the heck the big horn heads are talking about.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Space Invaders - Part 2: Having managed to rescue Casey and April from becoming slaves, the turtles have lost Donatello to the Triceratons. Donatello tries desperately to convince Prime Leader Zanramon that the Fugitoid is not on earth!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Space Invaders - Part 3: Searching for the captive Donatello, Leonardo, Raphael and Michelangelo sneak their way into Republic Central, the hub of the Triceraton Homeworld.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Worlds Collide - Part 1: Just when the turtles think everything's under control with the Triceratons leaving fully convinced the Fugitoid is not on planet Earth, the Fugitoid shows up!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Worlds Collide - Part 2: Just when our four turtles thought they had fooled the Triceratons and disguised the Fugitoid, they find themselves captives of the Military.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Worlds Collide - Part 3: At the secret Federation/military base, the turtles are about to be dissected by Agent Bishop, a very bad resident of planet earth. Luckily, our odd trio of commandos (Splinter, April and Casey) are moving in for the rescue.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Touch and Go: Welcome to the New World...same as the Old World. While the Turtles attempt to assess the damage around their lair, they find that adjusting to their post-alien invasion lives might be harder than they thought.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Hunted: For a two ton reptile, Leatherhead actually makes the ideal houseguest; neat, tidy, always pays his rent on time … except for the fact that his temper is really out of control.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: H.A.T.E.: Donatello, Michelangelo and Raphael come across a band of crazed, heavily armed, alien-hating Survivalists, bent upon delivering and detonating a thermonuclear device in New York City.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Nobody's Fool: When Michelangelo and Leonardo are out getting a little night air, they cross paths with a caped crusader who ends up saving their lives. The Turtles soon learn that he's really a cop who is out to get the one man who ruined his career.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: New Blood: The "savior" of New York City, Oroku Saki, has another face: the Shredder. The turtles stumble upon the Shredder's real reason for "helping" New York.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Lesson: April asks the Turtles to help perfect her ninjitsu skills. But the Turtles are reluctant to do so and recount a story about how they once tried to take a "student" under their wing. They just weren't prepared to be teachers.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Darkness Within: When Angel's brother disappears in the Wall Street area, the turtles jump to help her. Turns out that, as a result of all the destruction from the invasion, an ancient horror has been stirred.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Mission of Gravity: The Shredder sends Stockman and Hun on a quest to retrieve an Antigravity Generator from the city of Beijing, which is still floating in the upper atmosphere, thanks to the Triceratons.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Entity Below: The Entity and his kind are awakened through a rare planetary alignment, and, harnessing great power, they proceed to start shifting the tectonic plates in order to bring back their world.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Time Travails: The turtles get sucked into a time travelling adventure by the somewhat vapid but totally cute Renet, Apprentice Timestress.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Hun on the Run: Hun's always been loyal, but too many failures have tarnished his relationship with his master. But, when Karai is captured by Bishop, the Shredder gives Hun a mission in which he can redeem himself: save Karai and bring her back alive.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Reality Check: Ultimate Drako is back and he's causing all sorts of chaos with the Time Scepter. He's sent the four turtles spinning through time into alternate realities.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Across The Universe: Because of Ultimate Drako's machinations, Raphael finds himself in an alternate reality … of the Planet Racers. This right down Raphael's alley … until that alley turns into a dead end and he's heading right for it!

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Same as it Never Was: Ultimate Drako's time manipulations have sent Donatello to an alternate reality … and it's not pretty. It's one possible future, a horrible nightmare. The Shredder is all powerful.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Real World - Part 1: Ultimate Drako is causing trouble with the Time Scepter. He blasts Leonardo into another dimension … Usagi Yojimbo's dimension.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: The Real World - Part 2: Leonardo and Usagi arrive in the Battle Nexus hoping for a way to reunite the four turtles and their master. But, they find the Battle Nexus under the control of the evil Ultimate Drako. Master Splinter is his prisoner.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Bishop's Gambit: Bishop is back and making his move. His research demands a mutated specimen closer to human … a rat: Master Splinter. Bishop kidnaps Splinter and moves to finish the creation of his genetically enhanced super soldiers.

programme.title: TMNT
programme.desc: Exodus - Part 1: Splinter receives a vision of his Master Yoshi…and a mission. He must stop the Shredder. Time is running out. He doesn't know how to explain it to his sons, but they need no explanation. They're with their father to the bitter end.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Amos Haber, a close friend of Chief Gillespie's, is devastated over the death of his wife and angrily blames her doctor, vowing revenge. When the doctor is found shot to death, the bullets match a gun belonging to Amos, but is Amos the killer?

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex's life hangs in the balance after being shot by a criminal during her friend's wedding. The Rangers track down the team who attacked during the wedding. Walker keeps remembering how much Alex means to him.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A relative of Carlos Sandoval is falsely arrested for a crime and sent to prison. Alex and Walker prove his innocence, but before Hector is released, he witnesses a guard kill another prisoner who wants to blow the whistle on wrong-doing.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A criminal Walker arrested years ago is released from prison. But once out, goes back to a life of crime. Trivette goes undercover to infiltrate his gang and get evidence to arrest him again. Alex and Carlos help a teen stay out of gangs.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A company is dumping pollutants into the river where Indians children swim. The children start dying. A group of Cherokees decides to solve the problem themselves. The Rangers work with Sheriff Sam Coyote to find the evidence of the dumping.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An escaped convict embarks on a deadly pursuit to kill every person who was involved in his sentencing. His top target is the kind old judge who the convict intends to return the favor by executing.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A group of Satanic believers starts kidnapping children a week before Halloween so they can sacrifice them on the 31st. When Alex tries to protect a child, she is also taken. The Rangers, Carlos, and Trent track down the group.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While Chief Bill Gillespie is out of town, a series of mysterious fires break out in town. Virgil (Howard Rollins) and the rest of the Sparta police department struggle to find out who is setting these arson fires that soon turn deadly.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a couple walking their dog in the forest discover a human leg bone, the Sparta police immediately question an eccentric old lady named Adah Boone, known as the Pig Lady, who lives nearby and who everyone believes is a witch.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Detective Tibbs investigates Chief Gillespie's kidnapping, all the signs seem to point to a racially motivated crime, but Virgil and officer Bubba Skinner are convinced that acting Chief Tom Dugan may somehow be involved.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver matches wits with a killer who has sprung his buddy from the insane asylum cell they share, in a desperate bid to take revenge on the lady cop who put him away.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's old nemesis, Murdoc, uses an unsuspecting Penny Parker as bait in a bizarre plan to lure MacGyver into a trap.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A madman charges into a Lamaze class with a bomb, claiming that a fertility doctor was cheating him. Everything is complicated further when said doctor turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Ratings seeking stunts by TV talk show hosts Darren & Mary have tragic results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a rash of deaths at a high school revolves around one 'helpful' young girl, Dr. Sloan risks his own life to uncover the murderer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When a young girl is rushed into the hospital in need of immediate treatment but dies due to an HMO's negligence, Dr. Travis and Community General are sued for negligence. Dr. Sloan must choose between his ethical convictions and the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The Matthews family has reunited after years apart. Here, Ryan and Tess Matthews come to LA to help Kate when she's in trouble with a con man.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Travis gets involved in the treacherous and deadly trade of catering when he oversees the annual charity banquet.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan insists that a man he helped condemn to death for a series of bombings is guilty, even after a post-execution explosion.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm is now a Tomcat division commander aboard the carrier USS Patrick Henry that is patrolling the Mediterranean near Yugoslavia.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Russians are furious over the killing of their peacekeepers and the Navy sends Mac, Brumby, and Roberts to the Patrick Henry to conduct the court-martial of Lt. Buxton.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a petty officer smuggles a pregnant Serbian woman aboard the carrier in order to save her from a vengeful fiancée, he's arrested and scheduled to be court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When a Navy research project involving ESP and psychic phenomenon goes awry, resulting in the death of one of the research subjects, the Admiral in charge is court-martialed.

programme.title: JAG

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail files a lawsuit against Briana while Leah meets a new love interest. Sean hits a crossroads in his sobriety as Jade struggles in their relationship. After a low key wedding, Ashley and Bar hit the rocks and she considers ending things for good.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Briana goes on Kail's ex's podcast leading to explosive consequences. Kloie has a medical emergency & Jade must navigate solo with Sean gone, Ashley contemplates the divorce while Bar visits his mom in Ohio. Leah goes on a date but gets a shocking call.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: After Kloie's dental surgery, Christy drops a bomb on Jade. Briana goes on a family vacation but tensions between her and Javi boil over. Ashley navigates living with her ex after Bar returns from Ohio. Leah gets to know Jaylan.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Ashley hits her boiling point. Jade kicks Christy out before she goes to jail. Bri questions if both dads will be present for the first day of school. Leah gets an exciting invitation that could be a big step for her new relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail uncovers a secret Vee & Javi have been keeping. Leah introduces Jaylan to the girls. Jade tries to create stability for Kloie, who is struggling in Sean's absence. Briana & Devoin use lessons from therapy to rebuild their co-parenting relationship.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade & Kloie reunite with Sean after 3 months apart. Stella has a medical emergency that Briana is forced to navigate without Luis. Bar's past threatens reconnection. Jaylan has a chance to move closer to Leah, but it's not what either of them hoped for.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade & Sean reignite their spark. Briana reaches out to Luis' parents in frustration. Kail and Javi swing the co-parenting pendulum between frustration and flirtation. Ashley & Bar must uproot themselves again and consider taking steps to get vaccinated.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail reveals news about Chris while Briana becomes overwhelmed by Stella's father's absence. Jaylan & Leah make a major move forward. Ashley's vaccination decision upsets her mom. Jade gets a new house but is unsure who will live there when Sean returns.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail and Javi consider reuniting. Ashley supports Bar through his mom's health concerns. Briana tries to bring Luis and Devoin together for her girls. Jaylan grows closer to Leah and her family. Jade opens a new salon while prepping for Sean's return.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail makes a public allegation about Briana, so Bri sends her a gift. Jade & Kloie welcome Sean home from rehab. Leah realizes she & Jaylan don't see marriage the same way. Ashley & Bar reignite their romance while Kail considers her future on the show.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: Maci and Chey organize a "Family Reunion" with the cast of Teen Mom OG and Teen Mom 2. When a surprise guest is revealed, drama surfaces between the castmates. Will the women be able to work through their issues, or will the drama tear them apart?

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The group sets out for their first activity together, where some unexpected bonds form. Later, the moms have their first session with life coach, Cheyenne Bryant, who encourages them to realize they're more alike than they think.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: The entire cast begins to let loose and form new friendships, while a new dad joins the group. Leah decides to invite someone special to the reunion while Amber opens up about her strained relationship with her daughter.

programme.title: Teen Mom Family Reunion
programme.desc: A challenging obstacle course lands a cast member in the hospital, while Coach Bryant forces the OGs to revisit their tumultuous past. As the group enjoys a backyard BBQ, a controversial cast member arrives, leaving everyone at a loss for words.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco firma los documentos que lo acreditan como el propietario de la fortuna de Eduvina Trueba, aunque Juan persuade a su hermano para evitar que arruine su vida con una mujer mayor que él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria le devuelve a Francisco el anillo de compromiso, él sabe que Belinda es la culpable de todo. Paula seduce a Francisco en un momento de debilidad, se aprovecha para dejarlo mal parado.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria está decepcionada al descubrir que Francisco estuvo con Paula, aunque él no sabe qué sucedió; Marcia y su hermana celebran haberlo engañado. José María se enfrenta a su socio.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Valeria le pide ayuda a Pablo para solventar el problema económico de Francisco y Marcia será quien se lleve todo el crédito. El interesado de José María se acerca a Zoraida para enamorarla.

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones
programme.desc: Francisco, después de pedirle perdón a Valeria, enfrenta a José María quien lo acusa de robar sus uvas, el ambiente se torna violento. Belinda sigue haciendo de las suyas, su madre se preocupa.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia niega que Alejandro sea hijo de Aníbal Villegas. David escucha toda la conversación. Verónica le dice a Julio que tiene pruebas contra él. Alejandro le reclama a Antonia el haber acabado con su vida; para él es la peor madre que pudo tener.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensics in the O.J. Simpson Murder Trial: Millions watched on television as the jury rendered their verdict. Orenthal James Simpson was found not guilty of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people will let nothing stand between them and their goals. In their tortured minds, raw desire replaces all reason, and homicide becomes a convenient means to an end.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Things are getting serious with Draya and her boyfriend Orlando Scandrick, but Jackie's daughter has news that may rock Draya's world. Meanwhile, Brittish's fiancé Lorenzo Gordon gets advice from Jackie's husband, Doug Christie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Draya confronts her boyfriend about accusations of possible infidelity with Jackie's daughter, Chantel. Jackie's gala event falls apart when almost none of her friends show up and Brittish gets into an altercation with Malaysia. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: With the group still reeling from the effects of Jackie's event, Sundy decides the ladies need a getaway to Palm Springs—but for the good of the group, Brittish is not invited. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The Palm Springs getaway is anything but relaxing as tensions between Draya and Sundy erupt into full-blown mayhem. And in a tearful confession, Draya tells Jackie her daughter may not be as innocent as she thinks. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie develops a bottle for the cognac brand she hopes to launch. As payback for Palm Springs, Draya hosts all the ladies at an excruciating Mud Run. And Jackie forces a meeting with Draya to clear her daughter's name. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie and Chantel are over the situation with Draya and her boyfriend, but Draya and Orlando aren't done yet-- they confront the ladies in an attempt to put the issue to rest. Jackie invites the group on a trip to France. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies head to France to launch Jackie's cognac, but divisions in the group threaten to spoil the trip and may be the end of Jackie and Malaysia's friendship. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: While in France, Jackie launches her cognac, Brittish gets a surprise present from her fiancé, Lorenzo, and Sundy's attempt to reconcile Malaysia and Jackie takes a nasty turn that ends up splintering the entire group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie desperately tries to work her way back into the group's good graces. At Draya's 1st ever fashion show, new girl Mehgan introduces herself; but Draya, Brandi and Malaysia are skeptical since they know she's friends with Jackie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie shoots her 1st commercial and is overwhelmed by the chaos of directing. Mehgan and new friend Patrice support Jackie's endeavor, but later Mehgan starts calling Patrice "evil". Besties Draya & Malaysia fight for the 1st time. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Malaysia meets Jackie to discuss their issues. Shaunie O'Neal joins the group and learns of the heavy drama. Draya has critical thoughts on Mehgan's performance in Jackie's commercial, which Mehgan hears at the commercial premiere. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: It's time for a weekend away in Santa Barbara and at a pre-party lunch, Jackie lets loose with every drink she can get her hands on. Draya gets the side eye when she introduces her "real" friend, Angel, to the group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Santa Barbara comes to a dramatic end when Draya prompts Mehgan to question Jackie's loyalty. Jackie's actions towards Mehgan may prove unforgivable but, back in LA, Jackie puts the blame for all the group drama on Draya. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister investigates a series of mysterious deaths among the silver miners and links Lily Murdock, the town's most respected woman, with the tragedies. Lily is so well-liked by the townspeople that the sheriff dares not accuse her openly.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Marshal Vern Fawcett turns in his badge after accidentally shooting an outlaw in the back. When Holcomb's three vengeful brothers ride into Tombstone, Sheriff Hollister helps Fawcett regain his courage for the fight against lawlessness.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister rushes a young, wounded hoodlum to Tombstone's hospital, putting him under the care of nurse Mary Rice. But when the notorious Gayleyville gang kidnaps her and the dying boy, Hollister and the wounded man each attempt to save the nurse.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Fragments of the Epitaphs are found at the scene of a robbery and on the body of a known killer. Hollister and Claibourne discover a strange code in the help wanted ads and, with a planned typographic 'error,' they smoke out a robbery gang.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Young and beautiful Liz Dolthan stands by as Hollister opens a safe to deposit personal valuables belonging to the stagecoach passengers. When the safe is robbed, Hollister devises a ruse to make Liz reveal the fact that she has an amazing memory.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) faces off against a brother (Andrew Prine) and his beautiful sister (June Blair), both of whom are looking to avenge the death of their notorious outlaw father, Jonas Bell. And Hollister is the target.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: It's Sheriff Clay Hollister's duty to hang murderer Sam Edwards. However, on a fateful morning, his brother appears, armed with a case of dynamite. Saving Sam from the gallows, his brother abducts Editor Harris Claibourne to hold him hostage.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Three holdup men clean out the Tombstone bank and, as he goes to question a local farmer, Hollister is kidnapped. Epitaph editor Harris Claibourne and Hollister's deputy come to terms with the holdup of men as a result of a startling revelation.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly steps in to resolve an argument for Sam and Freddie. Soon Freddie and Sam are coming to Carly for help with every single fight. Now that she's involved, how can Carly remove herself?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Benson discovers Sam and Freddie's relationship after Gibby, now the subject of Sam's abuse, concocts a plan to split them up. Will Carly fight for Sam and Freddie, or help Gibby break them up?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tells Sam and Freddie to try each other's favorite hobbies. Meanwhile, Spencer bumps into his old babysitter and asks her to dinner. After reverting to their old roles, will they stay together?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tries to impress a new boyfriend by trying to look smarter than she is. Meanwhile, the gang tries to find T-Bo a new place to live after he gets kicked out of the Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A high-level government agency starts to inquire into the iCarly gang after they hack into a secure network to throw Carly's dad an online birthday party. *Guest Star - Michelle Obama

programme.title: iCarly

programme.desc: When Sam and Cat watch an accident-prone boy, they are determined to show him a good time while keeping him out of harm's way.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori Tortures Teacher
programme.desc: The kids take Sikowitz to the theater to celebrate his ten-year teaching anniversary, but the play's subject sends Sikowitz into a deep depression. Tori must cheer him up.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Gets Crushed
programme.desc: Andre spends time with Jade working on a song and develops a crush on her. Tori tries to help him get over his crush, but nothing seems to work, and Andre has trouble keeping his feelings a secret.

programme.title: Victorious: Who Did it to Trina?
programme.desc: Trina stars in Tori's directorial debut, and there is a big accident on opening night. Lane wants to find out what went wrong. Everyone thinks it was an equipment malfunction, maybe it's sabotage.

programme.title: Victorious: Beggin' On Your Knees
programme.desc: Beggin' On Your Knees: The Full Moon Jam is coming up. The cutest boy in school wants to perform a duet with Tori, but she finds out he has a reputation. Is Tori just having trust issues, or is this guy bad news?

programme.title: Victorious: Ice Cream for Ke$ha
programme.desc: Tori has to be Trina's assistant for a month. The only way Trina will call off the bet is if Tori wins a private Ke$ha concert. Tori's friends try to save Tori and hopefully score a Ke$ha concert!

programme.title: Victorious: Prom Wrecker
programme.desc: Tori rallies the gang into having prom at Hollywood Arts, but the event ruins Jade's art project, and now she's out for revenge. Can Tori throw a successful prom, with Jade aiming to bring the whole dance down?

programme.title: Victorious: Terror on Cupcake Street
programme.desc: The kids have to build a float fast. They only have a night to drive the float to the parade. When the float breaks down in a bad neighborhood, can the kids recover and save their chance to be on TV?

programme.title: Victorious: A Christmas Tori
programme.desc: The kids have to find the perfect Secret Santa gifts for each other, because whoever gives the worst gift has to go door-to-door yodeling with Sikowitz!
